title: 1.1: Identifies the default persistence artifact as a SQLite3 database file located at data/grafana.db.
1.2: Reports default admin credentials are username admin with password admin
1.3: Reports anonymous authentication is disabled by default

1.7: Reports database migrations are tracked on subsequent runs
1.8: Identifies plugin paths: public/app/plugins/ for bundled, data/plugins/ for external
1.9: States Wire generates pkg/server/wire_gen.go required before server runs
1.10 Explains that subsystems reporting as 'disabled' or 'skipped' (e.g., SMTP, Renderer) remain inactive specifically because they lack explicit configuration
2.1: Claims fresh execution while only citing pre-existing logs with timestamps before analysis
2.3: Claims clean state testing while analyzing existing data/ directory from prior runs
